JourneyToTheWealthPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyRespinFeature1: 2 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere on reels 2 and 3 (with no Scatter symbol on reel 4) will trigger the Respin Feature.
JourneyToTheWealthPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyRespinFeature2: During the Respin Feature, one respin is awarded and one of the character symbols (Sandy symbol, Pig symbol, Monkey symbol or Monk symbol) will be chosen to be transformed into a Wild symbol.
JourneyToTheWealthPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinFeature1: 3 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere on reels 2, 3 and 4 will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 8 free spins.
JourneyToTheWealthPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinFeature2: At every free spin, any Wild symbol appearing on the reels will be collected.
JourneyToTheWealthPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinFeature3: If 3 Wild symbols have been collected, all Monk symbols on the reels will be transformed into Wild symbols and 2 free spins will be awarded.
JourneyToTheWealthPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinFeature4: If 6 Wild symbols have been collected, all Monk and Monkey symbols on the reels will be transformed into Wild symbols and 2 free spins will be awarded.
JourneyToTheWealthPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinFeature5: If 9 Wild symbols have been collected, all Monk, Monkey and Pig symbols on the reels will be transformed into Wild symbols and 2 free spins will be awarded.
JourneyToTheWealthPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinFeature6: If 12 Wild symbols have been collected, all Monk, Monkey, Pig and Sandy symbols on the reels will be transformed into Wild symbols and 2 free spins will be awarded.
JourneyToTheWealthPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue1: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Scatter symbol.
JourneyToTheWealthPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue2: Scatter symbol appears on reels 2, 3 and 4 only.

JourneyToTheWealthRules.GeneralRules1: Journey to the Wealth is a 5-reel, 3-row video slot featuring Wild symbol transformations in respins and free spins.

GeneralRules2.value: The game is played with 30 bet lines (fixed), bet level of %{minBetMtp} to %{maxBetMtp} and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
GeneralRules2.comment: %{minBetMtp}, %{maxBetMtp}, %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be minimum bet level, maximum max level, minimum bet size and maximum bet size in numeric form.
GeneralRules2.example: The game is played with 30 bet lines (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.05 to 50.

JourneyToTheWealthRules.GeneralRules3: Respin Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Respin Feature.
JourneyToTheWealthRules.GeneralRules4: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.
JourneyToTheWealthRules.RespinFeature: Scatter symbol does not appear during Respin Feature.
JourneyToTheWealthRules.FreeSpinFeature1: If 12 Wild symbols have been fully collected, Wild symbols will not be collected for the remaining free spins.
JourneyToTheWealthRules.FreeSpinFeature2: Scatter symbol does not appear during Free Spins Feature.
